tasks.subject: Task 1: Reset accumulated AI-agent documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Truncate `docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md` (9119 lines) and `docs/NEXT_STEPS.md` (3392 lines) to compact summaries.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md`
- Modify: `docs/NEXT_STEPS.md`
- Modify: `docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md` is ≤ 150 lines
- [ ] `docs/NEXT_STEPS.md` is ≤ 100 lines
- [ ] DM + monitoring milestone documented

**Verify:** `wc -l docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md docs/NEXT_STEPS.md` → both ≤ 150 and ≤ 100

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md", "docs/NEXT_STEPS.md", "docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -l docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md docs/NEXT_STEPS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docs/CURRENT_STATUS.md ≤ 150 lines", "docs/NEXT_STEPS.md ≤ 100 lines", "DM + monitoring milestone documented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add generated TypeScript client to .gitignore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stop committing the auto-generated `clients/typescript/index.ts` (537 KB, 17,504 lines) to git.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.gitignore`
- Create: `clients/typescript/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `git check-ignore -v clients/typescript/index.ts` outputs a match
- [ ] `clients/typescript/README.md` documents `make gen-ts-client`

**Verify:** `git check-ignore -v clients/typescript/index.ts` → non-empty output

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore", "clients/typescript/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "git check-ignore -v clients/typescript/index.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git check-ignore returns a match for clients/typescript/index.ts", "clients/typescript/README.md documents make gen-ts-client"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Harden Promtail container security
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `no-new-privileges` and read-only filesystem to Promtail in all docker-compose files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docker/docker-compose.monitoring.yml`
- Modify: `docker/docker-compose.dev.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] promtail has `security_opt: ["no-new-privileges:true"]`
- [ ] promtail has `read_only: true`
- [ ] tmpfs covers `/tmp`
- [ ] `docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.monitoring.yml config` exits 0

**Verify:** `docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.monitoring.yml config 2>&1 | grep -c "no-new-privileges"` → `1`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docker/docker-compose.monitoring.yml", "docker/docker-compose.dev.yml"], "verifyCommand": "docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.monitoring.yml config 2>&1 | grep -c 'no-new-privileges'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both compose files have no-new-privileges on promtail", "both compose files have read_only: true on promtail", "both compose files validate with docker compose config"]}
```

- Create: `apps/gogomail-user-mcp/src/tools/account.ts`
- Create: `apps/gogomail-user-mcp/src/tools/notifications.ts`

- [ ] each domain file is ≤ 200 lines

tasks.subject: Task 6: Split webmail/src/lib/api.ts by domain + fix naming
tasks.description:

**Files:**

- Create: `apps/webmail/src/lib/api/mail.ts`

- Create: `apps/webmail/src/lib/api/index.ts`
- Modify: `apps/webmail/src/lib/api.ts`
- Modify: `apps/webmail/src/components/ComposeModal.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `api.ts` is ≤ 5 lines
- [ ] `MailSendRequest` exported from `api/mail.ts`
- [ ] `SendMessageRequest` backward compat alias present in `api/index.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/webmail/src/lib/api/types.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/auth.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/mail.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/dm.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/drive.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/calendar.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/contacts.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api/index.ts", "apps/webmail/src/lib/api.ts", "apps/webmail/src/components/ComposeModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir apps/webmail type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["api.ts is ≤ 5 lines", "MailSendRequest exported from api/mail.ts", "SendMessageRequest backward compat alias present", "pnpm type-check passes"]}
```
